comment.body:
I’d wager she’s past the “honeymoon phase” of starting this Substack. Now we’re living together and beginning to be annoyed with each other’s “quirky habits”. 

Would like for her to maybe take us out to dinner or give us a gift, like a Options Depth video like she promised 2 months ago or even a screen share of her trading in real time to see how she uses her volatility indicators and other info to execute trades.

I know I’m out of line and asking for too much for bringing this up. My advanced apologies.

comment.body:
So $20K+ per month isn’t enough? I apologized in advance for bringing it up, as this reaction was highly predictable. But would be nice to get some more education material to we can be more self sufficient. Right now we are just trading off information she gives us with no means to be able to produce it ourselves currently.

If it’s not replicable, then she should just claim this to be a quant investment service, not educational. No harm there. But some healthy accountability for previous promises made is not a bad thing and shouldn’t be ostracized.

comment.body:
The speed profile is as negative as it can be. This means, that charm flows are net positive, making dealers longer delta as time passes. If volatility continues to come down, the short vanna flow makes dealers again longer delta. 
The good news is that it cannot really let the market fall under 5250, only if vol catches up there caused by some ‘foregn’ flows out of the dealer hedging mechanism.
